resources.string: Username and/or password are wrong.\nPlease try again.
Your current app version is %s, however an update is available to version %s.
The update is now being downloaded, please do not turn off your device.
Download finished. By pressing the button below, you will be redirected to the installation page.\nOnce the installation has completed, you will be redirected to the app.
If an update is detected by the system, it will be automatically downloaded.

In order to install the newest version of Praxtour, please allow the Update Manager to install packages on this device.\n\nAfter pressing the button below, the system will ask you to toggle that permission. Once it is ON, you may need to press the ◀ symbol to return to this screen.

It seems you have not granted the update manager the permission to install packages on this device. You will not be able to continue using Praxtour while the update is not installed.\nIf you believe that you have granted the necessary permissions and are seeing this message, please contact us at service@praxtour.com.
For more information go to our website praxcloud.eu
